reviews.review_description: fiddle fat this game is just bad plus your comment should not even count since you made this game and i bet that you made that vid in the theater, and the particles are just bad like at least make them leaves, and why is there a size diff on the cover you cant do that in the game, and it ain’t even fall, i bet i can even make a better map, sorry just try harder next time please. 😔

developer_response.body: I didnt make the video in the theatre. If you go to my youtube you can tell that our voices are not the same. The size diff isnt in the game because it was made for the cover. and its fall in the update because its my favorite update in the game. I also made this map back when i was starting out. I wont think you can do better until I see it. You are very negative for no reason and your rating has been flagged for removal
